sourceAmbiguity: Signed-in account context could dominate the intake page.
decisionTaken: AuthenticatedAccountDisclosure is collapsible, secondary, and explicitly marked dominance=secondary.
whyThisFitsTheBlueprint: Account context should support the request task, not replace it.
operationalRisk: Contact task par_200 may introduce richer account data that needs the same restraint.
followUpIfPolicyChanges: Defer detailed contact truth to the par_200 workspace.
